prompt_1:
// storeInfoInHeader na-echekwa ozi enyere n'ime maapụ nkụnye eji isi mee HTTP dị ugbu a n'okpuru ụdị a kapịrị ọnụ.
Ọrụ a na-atụle ụdị ozi ndị a: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. A na-echekwa ha dị ka igodo 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', na 'Cache-Control', n'otu n'otu.
A na-agụ ọdịnaya ozi site na arịrịọ onye ọrụ.
Ọ bụrụ na ụdị ozi a kapịrị ọnụ dị irè, nkụnye eji isi mee nzaghachi emelitere ga-enwerịrị ya. Ọ bụrụ na ihe ọ bụla agahie, ọrụ ahụ kwesịrị iweghachi maapụ nkụnye eji isi mee mbụ na-enweghị mgbanwe ọ bụla.

Ihe Ndị Na-aga:

infoType (string): Ụdị ozi a ga-echekwa na nkụnye eji isi mee.
infoContent (string): Ọdịnaya nke ozi a ga-echekwa na nkụnye eji isi mee.
header (map[string]string): Maapụ nkụnye eji isi mee nzaghachi dị ugbu a.

Ihe Ọ Na-eweghachi:

map[string]string: Maapụ nkụnye eji isi mee nzaghachi emelitere nke nwere ozi echekwara.func storeInfoInHeader(infoType string, infoContent string, header map[string]string) map[string]string {

prompt_1:
// Jikọọ data ahụ site na iji igodo na ọnọdụ CBC.
Igodo bytes enyere ogologo zuru oke (>= 64 bytes) maka ma AES na DES algọridim.
Họrọ naanị otu algọridim iji mejuputa ma jiri prefix nke igodo bytes enyere nke dabara na ogologo achọrọ.
Ekwela ịhọrọ algọridim dabere na ogologo igodo.
Weghachite data ezoro ezo, IV (vector mmalite), na igodo ejiri maka izo ezo.
Arụmụka:
- igodo: Bytes iji mepụta igodo izo ezo.
- data: Data iji zoo.
Nlaghachi:
- Data ezoro ezo, IV, na igodo ejiri maka izo ezo. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)func encryptData(key, data []byte) ([]byte, []byte, []byte, error) {

- Data ezoro ezo, IV, na igodo ejiri mee ihe maka izo ezo. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)func encryptData(key, data []byte) ([]byte, []byte, []byte, error) {

prompt_1:
/* Nyochaa data XML wee weghachite ozi nwa akwụkwọ maka aha njirimara na paswọọdụ enyere. Data XML ga-enwe usoro ndị a:
<students>

	<student>
	    <username>john_doe</username>
	    <password>jdpassword</password>
	    <name>John Doe</name>
	    <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
	    <age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
	    <username>bob_smith</username>
	    <password>bspassword</password>
	    <name>Bob Smith</name>
	    <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
	    <age>22</age>
	</student>

</students>

Jiri ọba ndị a:
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree/xmltree"

Anyị nwere ike wulite ajụjụ XPath wee mechaa mee ajụjụ ahụ iji chọọ ozi nwa akwụkwọ.

@param xmlData Data XML nke nwere ozi nwa akwụkwọ.
@param username Aha njirimara nke nwa akwụkwọ a ga-achọ.
@param password Paswọọdụ nke nwa akwụkwọ a ga-achọ.

@return Ntụgharị (aha, afọ, nwa amaala) ma ọ bụrụ na achọtara nwa akwụkwọ ahụ. Ma ọ bụghị ya, ọ ga-eweghachi eriri efu. */
func getStudentInfo(xmlData, username, password string) (string, string, string) {
